dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 6642 IH: Responsible Opportunity for Under-21 Trucking Engagement Act
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Ms. Hageman introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on Transportation and Infrastructure

form.official-title: To amend title 49, United States Code, to authorize limited operation of commercial motor vehicles for eligible drivers under age 21 in interstate commerce, and for other purposes.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Responsible Opportunity for Under-21 Trucking Engagement Act or the ROUTE Act.

section.header: Limited interstate operation of commercial motor vehicles for drivers under 21

subsection.text: Chapter 313 of title 49, United States Code, is amended by adding at the end the following:

section.header: Limited interstate operation for drivers under 21

subsection.text: In this section, the term ‘eligible driver’ means an individual who—

paragraph.text: holds a commercial driver’s license limited to intrastate operation of a commercial motor vehicle; and

subparagraph.text: not less than 18 years old; and

subsection.header: Limited interstate operation of commercial motor vehicles
subsection.text: Notwithstanding any other provision of law, an eligible driver may operate a commercial motor vehicle in interstate commerce (as defined in section 31132) within a 150 air-mile radius of the normal work reporting location of the eligible driver, subject to the conditions that—

paragraph.text: not more than 14 consecutive hours after departing from that normal work reporting location, the eligible driver returns to that normal work reporting location and is released from work;
the eligible driver has at least 10 consecutive hours off duty separating each on-duty period described in paragraph (1); and
the normal work reporting location of the eligible driver remains in the State in which the eligible driver holds a commercial driver’s license described in subsection (a)(1).

subsection.text: The analysis for chapter 313 of title 49, United States Code, is amended by adding at the end the following:

toc.toc-entry: 31318. Limited interstate operation for drivers under 21.
